# phytron.db
# EPICS database for Phytron MCC-1 MINI-W-ETH
# StreamDevice records are separated from protocol definitions in phytron.proto.

# Position readback
record(ai, "$(P)$(R)POS_RBV") {
    field(DESC, "Motor position readback")
    field(DTYP, "stream")
    field(INP,  "@phytron.proto getPos $(PORT)")
    field(SCAN, "1 second")
    field(PREC, "3")
}

# Speed readback
record(ai, "$(P)$(R)SPEED_RBV") {
    field(DESC, "Motor speed readback")
    field(DTYP, "stream")
    field(INP,  "@phytron.proto getSpeed $(PORT)")
    field(SCAN, "2 second")
    field(PREC, "3")
}

# Positive move command
record(bo, "$(P)$(R)MOVE_PLUS") {
    field(DESC, "Move motor in positive direction")
    field(DTYP, "stream")
    field(OUT,  "@phytron.proto movePlus $(PORT)")
    field(ZNAM, "Idle")
    field(ONAM, "Start")
    field(HIGH, "0")
}

# Negative move command
record(bo, "$(P)$(R)MOVE_MINUS") {
    field(DESC, "Move motor in negative direction")
    field(DTYP, "stream")
    field(OUT,  "@phytron.proto moveMinus $(PORT)")
    field(ZNAM, "Idle")
    field(ONAM, "Start")
    field(HIGH, "0")
}

# Stop motion command
record(bo, "$(P)$(R)STOP") {
    field(DESC, "Stop motor motion")
    field(DTYP, "stream")
    field(OUT,  "@phytron.proto stopMove $(PORT)")
    field(ZNAM, "Idle")
    field(ONAM, "Stop")
    field(HIGH, "0")
}

#!../../bin/linux-x86_64/phytronIOC

# st.cmd
# IOC startup script for Phytron MCC-1 MINI-W-ETH
# Uses StreamDevice over asyn IP port to communicate via TCP/IP.
#
# IMPORTANT:
# Replace 192.168.0.10 with the actual controller IP address.

< envPaths

cd "${TOP}"

# Load database definitions
# Replace with the correct application DB DBD file if the IOC name differs.
dbLoadDatabase "dbd/phytronIOC.dbd"
phytronIOC_registerRecordDeviceDriver pdbbase

# Configure asyn IP port for the controller.
# Port name is kept simple for debugging and database macro usage.
echo "Configuring Phytron TCP port..."
drvAsynIPPortConfigure("PHYTRON","192.168.0.10:22222",0,0,0)

# Optional asyn trace for initial communication debugging.
# Increase trace mask as needed during commissioning.
asynSetTraceIOMask("PHYTRON",0,2)
asynSetTraceMask("PHYTRON",0,1)

# Load records.
# P = PV prefix, R = record prefix, PORT = asyn port name.
dbLoadRecords("db/phytron.db","P=PHY:,R=MCC1:,PORT=PHYTRON")

cd "${TOP}/iocBoot/${IOC}"

iocInit

# End of startup script
